name: Buildkite
description: Monitor Buildkite CI/CD pipelines for code change automation and deployment compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Buildkite at https://buildkite.com
2. Go to Personal Settings → API Access Tokens
3. Create a token with read_organizations and read_pipelines scopes
4. Copy and enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Buildkite → Personal Settings → API Access Tokens

checks.name: Code Changes
checks.description: Verifies Buildkite pipelines are configured for automated code change validation

checks.name: Separation of Environments
checks.description: Verifies Buildkite pipelines separate staging and production deployments
